## What you want the skill to do

## Why existing skills don't cover it

<!-- If you considered Atlas / Warden / Quill / Lens / Ledger / New Project, briefly say why none fit. -->

## Principle check

This project has three load-bearing principles (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full text). Confirm your proposal respects each:

- [ ] **Editorial only** — does not generate prose, dialogue, outlines, premises, or story ideas
- [ ] **Writer-led** — does not demand input from the writer; nothing required, no nags
- [ ] **Minimal by default** — sensible defaults, configuration is opt-in, templates have no required fields

If you can't tick all three, the proposal probably isn't a fit. Open it anyway if you want to discuss — sometimes the right answer is a roadmap "Future considerations" entry.
